current: Highlights local peak slopes, widths, and small shape changes while suppressing residual baseline.

parent: Multi-scale receptive fields cover narrow Raman peaks and broader spectral patterns.
Prevent the heteroscedastic head from escaping hard examples through unlimited variance.
Five is the smallest conventional deep ensemble with useful between-model variance.
